TIER_METRICS.FORMULA_REQUIRED: Formula is required when Aggregation is SUM

FORM.CODE_FORMAT: Only uppercase letters, numbers, and underscore. No spaces allowed.
FORM.CODE_READONLY: Code cannot be changed after creation
FORM.ICON_URL_MAX_LENGTH: Icon URL is too long (maximum 500 characters)
FORM.ICON_URL_DESCRIPTION: Supported formats: PNG, JPG, JPEG. Max size: 100KB.
FORM.RANK_DESCRIPTION: Lower number = lower tier. 1 is the lowest tier.
FORM.CONDITIONS_REQUIRED: At least one condition is required
FORM.CONDITIONS_INVALID_METRIC: All conditions must have a valid metric selected
FORM.BENEFITS_REQUIRED: At least one benefit is required

CONDITIONS.TITLE: Conditions
CONDITIONS.USE_POINTS_DESCRIPTION_TRUE: If Point is selected: Comparison is based on Calculated Points (via Metric Formula).
CONDITIONS.USE_POINTS_DESCRIPTION_FALSE: If Point is NOT selected: Comparison is based on the Actual Value of the Target Field (post-aggregation).
CONDITIONS.NO_ACTIVE_METRICS: No active metrics available. Please create metrics first.
CONDITIONS.NO_CHILDREN: No conditions added yet. Click 'Add Condition' or 'Add Group' to start.
CONDITIONS.TREE_INFO: Build complex conditions using AND/OR/NOT operators. Nest groups for advanced logic like (A >= 100 AND B >= 50) OR (C >= 200 AND (D > 10 OR E < 5)).
CONDITIONS.UPGRADE_NOTE: * If the user reaches the Min threshold, the membership tier will be upgraded immediately
CONDITIONS.LOGIC_INFO_DESC: Conditions are evaluated from top to bottom. AND has higher precedence than OR.
CONDITIONS.LOGIC_INFO_EXAMPLE: Example: A AND B OR C is interpreted as (A AND B) OR C.

BENEFITS.TITLE: Benefits
BENEFITS.ICON_URL_DESCRIPTION: Supported formats: PNG, JPG, JPEG. Max size: 100KB. Max length: 500 characters.
BENEFITS.CONTENT_MAX_LENGTH: Benefit content must not exceed 500 characters

VALIDATION.USERNAME_MIN_LENGTH: Username must be at least {{min}} characters
VALIDATION.PASSWORD_MIN_LENGTH: Password must be at least {{min}} characters
VALIDATION.PROPERTY_NAME_MAX_LENGTH: Property name must not exceed 50 characters
VALIDATION.PROPERTY_NAME_INVALID_FORMAT: Property name must start with a letter or underscore, and contain only letters, numbers, or underscores
VALIDATION.OPERATOR_INVALID: Operator must be AND or OR
VALIDATION.POINT_EARN_METHOD_INVALID: Point earn method must be FIX_AMOUNT or FORMULAR
VALIDATION.SORT_MIN: Sort must be a positive number
VALIDATION.BUY_RATE_INVALID: Earn Rate must be a valid decimal number (max 13 integer digits, 6 decimal digits)
VALIDATION.BUY_RATE_MAX_DIGITS: Max 19 digits total. For decimals: max 13 before and 6 after the dot
VALIDATION.BUY_RATE_POSITIVE: Earn Rate must be greater than 0
VALIDATION.SELL_RATE_INVALID: Burn Rate must be a valid decimal number (max 13 integer digits, 6 decimal digits)
VALIDATION.SELL_RATE_MAX_DIGITS: Max 19 digits total. For decimals: max 13 before and 6 after the dot
VALIDATION.POINT_COST_MIN: Point cost must be at least 0
VALIDATION.SORT_ORDER_MIN: Sort order must be at least 0
VALIDATION.TOTAL_STOCK_MIN: Total stock must be at least 0
VALIDATION.SELL_RATE_POSITIVE: Burn Rate must be greater than 0
VALIDATION.END_DATE_AFTER_START: End date must be greater than or equal to start date
VALIDATION.REWARD_MAPS_REQUIRED: At least one reward is required
VALIDATION.REWARD_ID_INVALID: Reward ID must be a number
VALIDATION.REWARD_ID_POSITIVE: Reward ID must be greater than 0
VALIDATION.WINDOW_TIME_RANGE: Window time must be an integer between 1 and 36.
VALIDATION.REVIEW_MONTHS_REQUIRED: At least one Execution Month must be selected
VALIDATION.GRACE_PERIOD_NON_NEGATIVE: Value must be a non-negative integer
VALIDATION.PRE_REVIEW_DAYS_NON_NEGATIVE: Value must be a non-negative integer and max 30

WELCOME.TITLE: Welcome back
WELCOME.SUBTITLE: Your loyalty management platform is ready. Explore features, manage campaigns, and track performance all in one place.
WELCOME.GETTING_STARTED_DESC: New to the platform? Here's what you can do:
WELCOME.FEATURE_1: Create and manage user accounts with different roles
WELCOME.FEATURE_2: Set up membership tiers and loyalty programs
WELCOME.FEATURE_3: Launch marketing campaigns and track performance
WELCOME.FEATURE_4: Monitor user activity and point distribution
